Deploy Container Apps environment only (without apps)
Deploy MCP Server Container App

Run MCP as a sidecar inside the backend Container App instead of as its own Container App. When true (default), the backend Container App is created with the MCP container co-located and MCP_ENDPOINT is set to http://localhost:3002/mcp. The standalone mcpServerContainerApp module and its OpenAI role are skipped. This eliminates the MCP→backend restart cascade, internal FQDN resolution, and the separate UAMI/PG-role for MCP. Set to false to keep the legacy two-app topology.
Deploy Backend Container App
Deploy Webapp Container App

Disable PostgreSQL password authentication (force Entra-only). Only safe once all clients/identities have been provisioned as Entra principals.

Object ID of the first Entra ID administrator (typically the deploying user or a security group). When empty, no administrator child resource is created — the postprovision hook is expected to add one.
Principal name (UPN for User, displayName for Group/ServicePrincipal) of the first Entra ID administrator
Principal type of the first Entra ID administrator
Tenant ID for Entra ID authentication. Defaults to the subscription tenant.

Create the initial Entra ID administrator as an ARM child resource. Disabled by default because PostgreSQL Flexible Server can reject administrator operations while newly-created servers are still settling; postprovision adds the administrator after restart/readiness checks.

Environment variables for the container
Secrets for the container (array of {name, value} objects)

Optional sidecar container to run inside the same Container App pod alongside the main container. When non-empty, it MUST include: name (string), image (string), cpu (string, e.g. '0.25'), memory (string, e.g. '0.5Gi'), and env (array of {name,value|secretRef} objects). The main container's UAMI client ID is auto-injected as AZURE_CLIENT_ID so the sidecar can use DefaultAzureCredential against the SAME identity. Sidecars share the pod's network namespace, so the main container reaches them via http://localhost:<sidecar-port>. Default {} = no sidecar.
Allow insecure (HTTP) ingress traffic without redirect to HTTPS
Tags for the resources

template.containers: [if(variables('hasSidecar'), createArray(createObject('name', parameters('containerAppName'), 'image', parameters('containerImage'), 'resources', createObject('cpu', json(parameters('cpu')), 'memory', parameters('memory')), 'env', concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-identity', parameters('containerAppName'))), '2023-01-31').clientId)), parameters('environmentVariables'))), createObject('name', parameters('sidecarContainer').name, 'image', parameters('sidecarContainer').image, 'resources', createObject('cpu', json(parameters('sidecarContainer').cpu), 'memory', parameters('sidecarContainer').memory), 'env', concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-identity', parameters('containerAppName'))), '2023-01-31').clientId)), if(contains(parameters('sidecarContainer'), 'env'), parameters('sidecarContainer').env, createArray())))), createArray(createObject('name', parameters('containerAppName'), 'image', parameters('containerImage'), 'resources', createObject('cpu', json(parameters('cpu')), 'memory', parameters('memory')), 'env', concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-identity', parameters('containerAppName'))), '2023-01-31').clientId)), parameters('environmentVariables')))))]

environmentVariables.value: [flatten(createArray(createArray(createObject('name', 'PGHOST', 'value', if(parameters('deployPostgresql'), if(parameters('postgresqlEnablePrivateEndpoint'), format('{0}.privatelink.postgres.database.azure.com', variables('postgresqlServerName')), reference('postgresql').outputs.fqdn.value), '')), createObject('name', 'PGPORT', 'value', '5432'), createObject('name', 'PGDATABASE', 'value', 'postgres'), createObject('name', 'PGUSER', 'value', format('{0}-identity', variables('backendContainerAppName'))), createObject('name', 'GRAPH_NAME', 'value', variables('graphName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT', 'value', if(not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint'))), parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint'), reference('aiServices').outputs.endpoint.value)), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_CHAT_DEPLOYMENT_NAME', 'value', if(not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiChatDeploymentName'))), parameters('azureOpenAiChatDeploymentName'), parameters('modelName'))), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_CHAT_ENDPOINT', 'value', if(parameters('deployCosmos'), reference('cosmosDb').outputs.endpoint.value, '')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_CHAT_DATABASE', 'value', parameters('cosmosDatabaseName')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_CHAT_CONTAINER', 'value', parameters('cosmosContainerName')), createObject('name', 'MCP_ENDPOINT', 'value', if(parameters('mcpServerSidecar'), 'http://localhost:3002/mcp', format('https://{0}.internal.{1}/mcp', variables('mcpServerContainerAppName'), reference('containerAppsEnv').outputs.defaultDomain.value))), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString'))), if(parameters('deployRedis'), createArray(createObject('name', 'REDIS_URL', 'secretRef', 'redis-url')), createArray())))]

parameters.secrets: [if(parameters('deployRedis'), createObject('value', createArray(createObject('name', 'redis-url', 'value', format('rediss://:{0}@{1}:{2}/0', listKeys('redisAccount', '2024-03-01').primaryKey, reference('redisCache').outputs.hostName.value, reference('redisCache').outputs.sslPort.value)))), createObject('value', createArray()))]
parameters.sidecarContainer: [if(parameters('mcpServerSidecar'), createObject('value', createObject('name', 'mcp-server', 'image', format('{0}/{1}:{2}', reference('acrVnet').outputs.acrLoginServer.value, parameters('mcpServerImageName'), parameters('mcpServerImageTag')), 'cpu', parameters('mcpServerCpu'), 'memory', parameters('mcpServerMemory'), 'env', createArray(createObject('name', 'PGHOST', 'value', if(parameters('deployPostgresql'), if(parameters('postgresqlEnablePrivateEndpoint'), format('{0}.privatelink.postgres.database.azure.com', variables('postgresqlServerName')), reference('postgresql').outputs.fqdn.value), '')), createObject('name', 'PGPORT', 'value', '5432'), createObject('name', 'PGDATABASE', 'value', 'postgres'), createObject('name', 'PGUSER', 'value', format('{0}-identity', variables('backendContainerAppName'))), createObject('name', 'GRAPH_NAME', 'value', variables('graphName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT', 'value', if(not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint'))), parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint'), reference('aiServices').outputs.endpoint.value)), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString'))))), createObject('value', createObject()))]

metadata.description: The location for the Container App
The name of the Container App
The resource ID of the Container Apps Environment
The container image to deploy
The name of the Azure Container Registry
The target port for the container
Enable external ingress
CPU cores for the container
Memory for the container
Minimum replicas
Maximum replicas
Environment variables for the container
Secrets for the container (array of {name, value} objects)

Optional sidecar container to run inside the same Container App pod alongside the main container. When non-empty, it MUST include: name (string), image (string), cpu (string, e.g. '0.25'), memory (string, e.g. '0.5Gi'), and env (array of {name,value|secretRef} objects). The main container's UAMI client ID is auto-injected as AZURE_CLIENT_ID so the sidecar can use DefaultAzureCredential against the SAME identity. Sidecars share the pod's network namespace, so the main container reaches them via http://localhost:<sidecar-port>. Default {} = no sidecar.
Allow insecure (HTTP) ingress traffic without redirect to HTTPS
Tags for the resources

template.containers: [if(variables('hasSidecar'), createArray(createObject('name', parameters('containerAppName'), 'image', parameters('containerImage'), 'resources', createObject('cpu', json(parameters('cpu')), 'memory', parameters('memory')), 'env', concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-identity', parameters('containerAppName'))), '2023-01-31').clientId)), parameters('environmentVariables'))), createObject('name', parameters('sidecarContainer').name, 'image', parameters('sidecarContainer').image, 'resources', createObject('cpu', json(parameters('sidecarContainer').cpu), 'memory', parameters('sidecarContainer').memory), 'env', concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-identity', parameters('containerAppName'))), '2023-01-31').clientId)), if(contains(parameters('sidecarContainer'), 'env'), parameters('sidecarContainer').env, createArray())))), createArray(createObject('name', parameters('containerAppName'), 'image', parameters('containerImage'), 'resources', createObject('cpu', json(parameters('cpu')), 'memory', parameters('memory')), 'env', concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('{0}-identity', parameters('containerAppName'))), '2023-01-31').clientId)), parameters('environmentVariables')))))]
